descriptions.text:
Goiken Muyou 2 is a 3d fighting game that features 10 characters (male & female ones) and different game modes (story mode, arcade, vs, tag team, etc).

Programmed by ex-members of the Virtua Fighter team, this game has a yankee style, biker gang feel to it with characters varying from high school students to a yakuza type gangster via a wrestling-loving English teacher. The title means 'your opinion is worthless'. Fair enough.

Yankee, delinquent girls, gangsters, teachers, ninja and wrestler...
These unique characters will interact with each other using their fists on the street of the night!
Besides adding useful game modes such as the training mode and an accessible ranking,
these is also a mode for you to fight with an AI character to practice the skills that you have learned.
So work your way to become the strongest by overcome your weaknesses by practicing with the AI!
